sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Aëtius</hi> Medicus [Aët.] <date TEIform="date">vi A.D.</date> Editio Aldina, Venice 1534 (Lib. i-viii); Lib. vii 1-90, ed. J. Hirschberg, Leipzig 1899; Lib. ix, ed. S. Zervos, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἀθηνᾶ</foreign> xxiii (1911) p. 265; Lib. xi, ed. C. Daremberg & C. E.
